[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1111001100 6
1 0011101110 6
2 1000010000 2
3 1001110010 5
4 1011001011 6
5 1111011110 8
6 0001011111 6
7 1011111110 8

12 21 1000010000 2 match 2

70 07 0011001100 4
